creator: olivierw1+bugzilla-freebsd@hotmail.com
text:
Hello,

I just upgrade from postgrey 1.36 to 1.37 and while restarting the service I got this error:
Nov  9 20:05:27 freebsd postgrey[59233]: FATAL: Can't locate IO/Socket/INET6.pm in @INC (you may need to install the IO::Socket::INET6 module) (@INC contains: /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/mach/5.24 /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl /usr/local/lib/perl5/5.24/mach /usr/local/lib/perl5/5.24) at /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/Net/Server/Proto.pm line 122.


I had to install: "p5-IO-Socket-INET6" to solve the issue.

Best Regards,
Olivier
